Document:
# Rule 5: Bug Abuse and Unfair Play
Do not use bugs, oversights, or unintended game mechanics — regardless of whether they give you an advantage or just seem funny. Intentionally using bugs, glitches, or other non-standard mechanics for benefit, fun, sabotage, or destabilizing the round is prohibited.
## NOT a violation: - Setting up keybinds or macros using the game’s built-in functionality or the `bind` command.
## Examples of violations: - Using autoclickers or external macros. - Using modifications or scripts to automatically aim, see through walls, disable shadows, etc. - Intentionally causing visual or mechanical glitches for entertainment. - Building barricades or other structures on surfaces not intended for construction (for example, on water). - Using incomplete structures (for example, unconstructed airlocks) as defensive elements. - Obtaining and using reagents not available in [textlink="Chemicals" link="RMCChemicals"], except for specialized items (for example, survivor grenades). Using desoxyephedrine produced from plants is considered a violation. - Nesting storage items inside one another to increase capacity beyond what the game allows. The exception is containers specifically designed for this purpose (for example, grenade boxes, medical kits, pill bottles, and other specialized items).
